file_name: Questionnaire - Impression Dental Group – Coastal Dental Care_0.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition, including if IDG and CDC are close competitors and there are few alternatives.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with IDG and/or CDC.
